title: Know the title and thumbnail before you make the video
principle: The packaging is the product's promise. Designing the title/thumbnail first forces the whole video to be built to deliver one clear, clickable idea.
rule: Lock a working title + thumbnail concept at the research/script stage and make the video pay it off. If a segment doesn't serve the packaged promise, cut it.

source.name: MrBeast — 'How to Succeed in MrBeast Production' internal memo (2024 leak)
source.quote: YOU MUST KNOW THE TITLE AND THUMBNAILS OF THE VIDEOS YOU ARE MAKING
